title: Haiphong、Haiphong — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Haiphong、Haiphong的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Haiphong是Haiphong的一個城市，人口約2,100,000。Vietnam’s major port city and industrial hub, offering a more affordable and less crowded alternative to Hanoi with a growing economy and improving infrastructure.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
